candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Balance-sheet cash line and best match for cash and cash equivalents among provided balance-sheet labels.
Would be ideal semantically, but preview values are blank while another active cash line exists.
Usually only a component of cash, not total cash and equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of the period / year
candidates.why: Cash-flow closing cash agrees numerically in several years, but target should come from the balance sheet when available.

variables.notes: Preferred balance-sheet cash label over cash-flow closing cash.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Specific non-current debt line, not total current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Explicit current-maturity debt line; best match for short-term debt/current portion of long-term debt and excludes leases.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit within-1-year debt maturity line. Excludes lease liabilities per rule. Although a 'Secured bank loans' row also appears to represent current debt in some years, selecting both would risk double counting.
No clear taxes payable/current tax liabilities row is visible on the provided balance sheet preview.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet PPE line and preferred total/net PPE measure.
Gross tangible assets would be less preferred than reported PPE; also appears blank.

candidates.row_label: Acc Depr Other Tangible Fixed Assets
candidates.why: Accumulated depreciation component, not PPE total.

variables.notes: Used the direct PPE line; net PPE is preferred.
Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.why: Exact match for operating cash flow / net cash from operating activities.
Operating cash measure before some cash items such as interest/tax; less final than net cash from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Cash generated from operations before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not final operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Preferred the final net operating cash flow line over intermediate subtotals.
